comments: Never heard them be so vocal. Males frequently chasing each other and females to attempt to mate with.
Parents are becoming territorial to the one chick now.
Briefly saw over the Sundial Garden and again on the opposite side of the park.
Single individual flying around the pond.
On the old scrapes with other geese. White face patch. Black neck and white belly. Photos added.
